message:
feat(tui): full ratatui search interface + wizard cleanup

TUI (src/ui/tui.rs):
- Replace stub module with ratatui-based search interface wired to Tantivy
  (~9700 lines). Includes search input, result list with keyboard
  navigation, detail pane, tabbed views, mouse support, and theming.

Wizard (src/pages/wizard.rs):
- Remove CF-specific deployment fields (branch, account_id, api_token)
  and set_deploy_target method
- Simplify final output location tracking

Also syncs beads issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
